description: Register hours on projects and invoice from logged time
preflight: GET /activity or POST /activity to resolve activity
POST /project/projectActivity to link activity to project if needed
endpoints: POST /timesheet/entry — body: {employee:{id}, project:{id}, activity:{id}, date, hours, comment}
PUT /order/{id}/:invoice — invoice project work after time registration
common_errors: Do not use /project/{id}/activity — the correct endpoints are /activity and /project/projectActivity
company/salesmodules may return 403 in competition sandboxes; treat module activation as best-effort
Project activity may need to be linked before posting timesheet entries
tips: For prompts that say to log hours and then invoice the customer, treat it as a timesheet workflow first and invoice second.
